memberdef.argsstring: (const FString &Section, const FString &Key, T &Value, const FString &DefaultSectionPath, TFunction< bool(const FString &, const FString &, T &, const FString &)> GetConfigFunc)
memberdef.name: LoadConfigValueWithFallback

param.type: TFunction< bool(const FString &, const FString &, T &, const FString &)>

detaileddescription.para: Private template helper for unified INI config fallback logic. Attempts to load from primary section first, then falls back to default section if provided.

parameterdescription.para: Reference to store the loaded value
Lambda/function to call GConfig->Get* method for specific type

simplesect.para: true if value was loaded successfully, false otherwise
